_meta.note: Fire & Blood reconciler output for fab-reign-of-the-dragon-04 (smoke=False).

edges.quote: He descended on the islands in 2 AC, riding Balerion
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aegon I Targaryen BONDED_TO Balerion

edges.quote: sent his son Addam
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Manfred Hightower PARENT_OF Addam Hightower

edges.quote: Lord Hightower's younger son, Garmon
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Manfred Hightower PARENT_OF Garmon Hightower

edges.quote: Ser Addam succeeded his father as the Lord of the High Tower
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Addam Hightower SUCCEEDS Manfred Hightower

edges.quote: Alys Oakheart, daughter to the Lord of Old Oak
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lord Oakheart PARENT_OF Alys Oakheart

edges.quote: all of Westeros south of the Wall was now ruled by Aegon Targaryen
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aegon I Targaryen RULES Seven Kingdoms

edges.quote: Meria Martell, the Princess of Dorne
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Meria Martell RULES Dorne

edges.quote: commanded his Warden of the North, Torrhen Stark of Winterfell
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aegon I Targaryen COMMANDS Torrhen Stark

edges.quote: Steffon Sunderland renewed his fealty to the Eyrie
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Steffon Sunderland SWORN_TO Ronnel Arryn

edges.quote: the Wyl attackers slew Lord Oakheart and most of the wedding guests
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Wyl of Wyl KILLS Lord Oakheart

edges.quote: Lodos filled his robes with stones and walked into the sea
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Lodos AGENT_IN Death of Lodos

edges.quote: Lodos filled his robes with stones and walked into the sea
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Lodos VICTIM_IN Death of Lodos

edges.quote: the stormlanders were butchered like hogs in a pen
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Wyl of Wyl AGENT_IN Ambush on the Boneway

edges.quote: the stormlanders were butchered like hogs in a pen
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Orys Baratheon VICTIM_IN Ambush on the Boneway

edges.quote: the Widow-lover had lopped off each man’s sword hand
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Wyl of Wyl AGENT_IN Ransom and maiming of Orys Baratheon

edges.quote: the Widow-lover had lopped off each man’s sword hand
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Orys Baratheon PARTICIPATES_IN Ransom and maiming of Orys Baratheon

edges.quote: a yard-long iron bolt caught the queen's dragon in the right eye
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Meraxes VICTIM_IN Death of Meraxes

edges.quote: Whether Rhaenys Targaryen outlived her dragon remains a matter of dispute
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Rhaenys Targaryen VICTIM_IN Death of Rhaenys Targaryen

edges.quote: Meria Martell, the Yellow Toad of Dorne, died abed
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Meria Martell VICTIM_IN Death of Meria Martell

edges.quote: continued until 26 AC
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Aegon I Targaryen AGENT_IN Building of King's Landing's walls
